# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  processing-instruction target="pre" data=""
  <!doctype html>
  processing-instruction target="between" data=""
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    processing-instruction target="before_head" data=""
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      processing-instruction target="in_head" data=""
    processing-instruction target="after_head" data=""
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      processing-instruction target="in_body" data=""
    processing-instruction target="after_body" data=""
  processing-instruction target="after_after" data=""
